name: Dying Roses
description:
Hello This is a Remake of My very first Bot Which I have been so badly wanting to redo, so I am making it Much better Than before And hopefully this will do what I want it to do. Man It has already been a Year since my first bot, Time flies I guess.

Your the Last Angel left Alive while Alastor is a King in a Dying Kingdom, Will you keep yourself A secret or will you help the king out?

First bot: Here
creator: foxet
